GAS PLANT IS SOLD AND \


new COMPANY FORMED

pages.raw_text:
The Spokane Falls Gaslisht COM
pany was sold at auction at IL
o'clock this morning for the sum of
100000. The purchase was made in
the name Of Charles S. Reeves OF Ia
coma, who Immediately filed the re-
Quired certified check for $4,000 with
w. A. Aldrich. secretary of the COM
pany. His was the only bid. The
check is drawn on the Bank of Mon
treal. Mr., Reeves Represents the
Philadelphia syndicate for whom
Isaac w. Anderson has been acting.


Before the sale took place and i'm.
m4diately after the reading of the
notice. Frank Post, attorney for
Charles Theis. entered a protest on
behalf Of his client, stating that an
action was now pending in the SUI
perior court to prevent the sale.


He further stated that in the pub
lished notice the date was set as May
8. and that the only notice given Of
today's sale had been few lines In
an afternoon paper yesterday and this
